utterances.source_text: On duplique certains tâches de suivi, ce qui gaspille du temps, donc les responsabilités doivent être clarifiées.
utterances.production_ground_truth: On are duplicating some follow-up tasks, which wastes time, so responsibilities need to be clarified.
utterances.production_transcript: There is duplication in certain follow-ups which is wasting time, so it's necessary to clarify roles.

utterance_translations.text: On are duplicating some follow-up tasks, which wastes time, so responsibilities need to be clarified.

utterances.source_text: Bonsoir, et merci d'être ici. Ce projet peut réussir si nous restons concentrés sur les priorités en premier lieu.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Good evening, and thank you for being here. This project can succeed if we stay focused on the priorities first.
utterances.production_transcript: Good evening. Thank you for being here. The project can work if we stay very focused on priorities first.

utterance_translations.text: Good evening, and thank you for being here. This project can succeed if we stay focused on the priorities first.

utterances.source_text: Nous ne pouvons pas continuer à couper le budget de l'école et ensuite faire semblant d'être surpris quand les classes deviennent surpeuplées.
utterances.production_ground_truth: We cannot keep cutting the school budget and then act surprised when classes become overcrowded.
utterances.production_transcript: It's obvious that continually cutting the school budget leads to overcrowded classrooms, which is absurd.

utterance_translations.text: We cannot keep cutting the school budget and then act surprised when classes become overcrowded.

utterances.source_text: Certaines options restent à l'étude, mais aucune action ne sera prise avant de nouvelles consultations avec nos partenaires.
utterances.production_ground_truth: Some options remain under consideration, but no action will be taken before further consultations with our partners.
utterances.production_transcript: Some options have not been entirely ruled out at this stage, though their implementation requires further consultation with my partner.

utterance_translations.text: Some options remain under consideration, but no action will be taken before further consultations with our partners.
